name: mandate-labs/mandate
summary: Open policy engine that binds AI agents to user-defined permissions: spending limits, allow-lists and intent constraints enforced at settlement. Verifiable, auditable delegation for autonomous agents.

name: PayRail
summary: Neutral payment + escrow rail for agent-to-agent commerce. Agents discover services, pay and settle directly with policy-bound, atomic do-and-pay execution.

name: veritas-zk/veritas
summary: Zero-knowledge proofs that an AI agent acted within its mandate without revealing the underlying data. Preventative, policy-bound verifiability for high-stakes agent actions.

name: Ledgerlytics
summary: Agent that automates on-chain treasury reconciliation and invoicing for crypto-native companies, with an immutable audit trail of every action it takes.

name: Emberterm
summary: Unified trading terminal for prediction markets: real-time data, advanced execution and discovery across venues, plus social signal surfaces like leaderboards and wallet tracking.

name: lattice-vault/signer
summary: Post-quantum signing for self-custody wallets. Drop-in ML-DSA signatures and a crypto-agility layer so chains can rotate signature schemes without a hard fork.

name: Frameview
summary: Consumer social app for sharing on-chain portfolios as Farcaster frames. Mobile-first, no clear monetisation yet.

name: MoonRocketInu
summary: Meme coin presale promising guaranteed 1000x returns. Airdrop farming campaign live now.
